titleStmt.title: SII 20.56: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 56. (B.K. No. 68 of 1936-37.) KUḶĒKUMAṬGI, SINDGI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab built into the right wall of Chandraśēkhara temple.

summary.p: This record is dated Chālukya-Vikrama year 7, Dundubhi, Āshāḍha, amāvāsye Tuesday, corresponding regularly to A.D. 1082, June 28.
The bottom portion of the inscription is chiselled out. It mentions Mahāsāmanta Siṁgarasa of Siyaḷāra family, Udayāditya and Perggaḍe Chaṇḍimayya who was the Prabhu of Kumbiṭṭage.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti samastabhuvanāsrayaṁ śrī prithvīvalla
bha mahārājāti(dhi)rājaṁ paramēsvaraṁ parama
bhaṭṭarakaṁ satyāsrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷu
kyabharaṇaṁ śrī matribhuvanamalladēvara vija
yarājyamuttarōtva(tta)rābhivṛddhipravarddhamānamā
candrarkkatāraṁbaraṁ kalyāṇada nelevīḍinoḷu su
khasaṁkatāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamiralu ta
tpādapadmōpajīvi . samadhigatapaṁcamahāsabdamahā
sāmaṁta vīraśrīkāṁtaṁ tagaranagaradhīsvaraṁ subhaṭamahē
svaraṁ śiyaḷāravaṁsōdbhavaṁ vibhavādharīkritapūrūravaṁ
ḍaṁgārabhērīnirgghōṣaṇaṁ samaraikabhīṣaṇaṁ suvarṇnaga
ruḍadhvajaṁ vimaḷakīrtidhvajaṁ nāyigana cakra paracakra
vakraṁ nāmādi samastaprasastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahā
sāmaṁtaṁ siṁgarasaruṁ Udeyādityarasaruṁ śrīmaccāḷu
kyavikramakālada 7 neya duṁdubhi saṁvatsarada Aṣāḍadamavasye
maṁgaḷavāradaṁdu kuṁbiṭṭageya prabhu perggaḍe caṁḍimayyana kayya
Digital edition of SII 20.56 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
